game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **워터파크 스토리 (Waterpark Story):** Players construct and manage a grid-based water park by tapping on a menu to select and place various pool types, water slides, and facilities onto available land. Guests visit the park, generating income and satisfaction, which can lead to them becoming SNS friends and providing feedback that guides further development. The core loop involves building attractions, establishing restaurants to offer diverse dishes and drinks, and gifting items like tubes and swimsuits to enhance guest satisfaction. Progression is driven by attracting more visitors, increasing SNS popularity, and unlocking new types of equipment and customization options for the park, including outdoor pools. The objective is to create a highly-rated water park that satisfies guests, with difficulty scaling as guest expectations for variety and service increase.
game_info.description: Welcome to Waterpark Story! Build and manage your dream water park by placing pools, slides, and facilities on a grid. Attract guests who generate income and satisfaction points. Serve them food and drinks, gift them items like tubes and swimsuits, and they'll become your SNS friends, helping your park grow. Expand your park, unlock new attractions, and create a highly-rated destination that keeps guests happy and coming back for more!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu and select grid tiles
Space: Place selected item or interact with guests
Z: Open/close build menu or cancel action
Shift: Speed up guest movement (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic game mechanics: menu navigation, placing facilities, guest spawning, and income generation. This validates core gameplay loop functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through build menu, place a pool and restaurant systematically. Wait for guests to spawn, interact with facilities, and generate income. Verify that basic progression works.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully place multiple facilities, spawn guests, generate income, and increase satisfaction. The test passes if guests interact with facilities and the park gains SNS friends without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully place multiple facilities, spawn guests, generate income, and increase satisfaction. The test passes if guests interact with facilities and the park gains SNS friends without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing win condition by implementing optimal strategy to reach maximum park rating and satisfy all victory requirements. This validates that the game is winnable.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Rapidly build a diverse water park with pools, slides, restaurants, and gift shops. Strategically place high-value items to maximize guest satisfaction. Serve guests efficiently and gift items to accelerate SNS friend growth and park rating.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching target park rating (4+ stars) and SNS friend count (20+). The test succeeds when win condition triggers within reasonable time frame.
